title: Post-it widget on dashboards
excerpt: Would love the option to add a “post-it” to a dashboard. Would be similar to the current text widget, but smaller and could maybe be tagged on to another widget on the dashboard. Post-it’s could be color-coded (can chang…

posts.author: Leah54 (Leah S)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love the option to add a “post-it” to a dashboard. Would be similar to the current text widget, but smaller and could maybe be tagged on to another widget on the dashboard. Post-it’s could be color-coded (can change to different colors) unlike the text widget. Think this would be super helpful for us and others.
